lines.text: Tuition and fee revenue of $80,000,000 recognized over academic term performance obligations per ASC 606 606-10-25-19, 606-10-55-91.
Contributions and grants of $25,000,000 classified and recognized per ASC 958 958-605-25-11, 958-605-55-8.
Endowment net assets of $400,000,000 classified under UPMIFA spending policy and ASC 958 958-205-45-14, 958-320-45-1.
Functional expense allocation (instruction $85,000,000, support $22,000,000) per ASC 958 958-205-45-6, 958-720-45-2.
Title IV financial responsibility composite score 2.8 (pass) per ASC 958 958-205-45-1, 34 CFR 668.172 composite score.
Net assets with donor restrictions $280,000,000 and without donor restrictions $120,000,000 per ASC 958 958-205-45-1, 958-205-45-7.
Auxiliary enterprise revenue (housing $8,000,000, dining $4,500,000, athletics $2,500,000) per ASC 958 958-720-45-15.
